name: Clearbit
description: Company and person data enrichment API. Look up people by email, companies by domain, find domains from company names, search for prospects, and identify website visitors by IP.

capabilities.name: person_find
capabilities.description: Look up a person by email address to retrieve social profiles, employment, and demographic data.

capabilities.name: company_find
capabilities.description: Look up a company by domain to retrieve firmographic data, social profiles, and technology stack.

capabilities.name: combined_find
capabilities.description: Look up both person and company data in a single request using an email address.

capabilities.name: name_to_domain_find
capabilities.description: Find a company domain given the company name.

capabilities.name: prospector_search
capabilities.description: Search for people at a company by role, seniority, title, or location.

capabilities.name: reveal_find
capabilities.description: Identify a company visiting your website by IP address.
